query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accounting_purchases` (
  `id` bigint AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `transaction_date` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `partner_id` bigint,
  `item_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `quantity` decimal(10, 3) NOT NULL,
  `unit` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `unit_price` decimal(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  `total_amount` decimal(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  `tax_amount` decimal(15, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  `tax_rate` decimal(5, 2) DEFAULT 10.00,
  `evidence_type` enum('tax_invoice', 'receipt', 'statement', 'none') DEFAULT 'none',
  `evidence_number` varchar(100),
  `source_type` varchar(50),
  `source_id` bigint,
  `notes` text,
  `status` enum('pending', 'approved', 'paid', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `created_by` bigint NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `transaction_date_idx` (`transaction_date`),
  INDEX `partner_id_idx` (`partner_id`),
  INDEX `source_idx` (`source_type`, `source_id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accounting_sales` (
  `id` bigint AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `transaction_date` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `partner_id` bigint,
  `item_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `quantity` decimal(10, 3) NOT NULL,
  `unit` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `unit_price` decimal(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  `total_amount` decimal(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  `tax_amount` decimal(15, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  `tax_rate` decimal(5, 2) DEFAULT 10.00,
  `evidence_type` enum('tax_invoice', 'receipt', 'statement', 'none') DEFAULT 'none',
  `evidence_number` varchar(100),
  `source_type` varchar(50),
  `source_id` bigint,
  `notes` text,
  `status` enum('pending', 'approved', 'received', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `created_by` bigint NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX `transaction_date_idx` (`transaction_date`),
  INDEX `partner_id_idx` (`partner_id`),
  INDEX `source_idx` (`source_type`, `source_id`)
);
